name: Apricot Almond Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup brown sugar, salt, and undissolved yeast.
2. Heat milk, water, and 3 tablespoons margarine to 120°F - 130°F.
3. Add the dry ingredients; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed of the mixer.
4. Add eggs and 1 cup flour; beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
5. Stir in enough remaining flour to make soft dough. Knead for 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Grease a bowl with the top; cover; let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
7. Punch down the dough. Divide into half; roll each to a 14 x 9 inch rectangle.
8. Brush with melted margarine; sprinkle with remaining brown sugar, apricots, and almonds.
9. Roll each up from the long side; seal seams.
10. Cut each roll into 7 slices. Make 2 cuts in the side of each slice, 2/3 the way through.
11. Fan sections; set on a greased baking sheet. Cover; let rise until doubled.
12. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
13. Cool. Glaze if desired.
